alkylation reagent: 30 mM iodacetamide (30 min, room temperature, in the dark)
alkylation concentration: 30 mM iodacetamide (30 min, room temperature, in the dark)
cleavage agent: using a two-stage Lys-C and trypsin digestion protocol
collision energy: fragmented with a collision energy of 30 NCE (normalized collision energy)
instrument: coupled to an Q-Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
labeling: before liquid chromatography (LC)–MS measurement, which was conducted using an ultra-performance liquid chromatography system (Ultimate 3000 UPLC) (Thermo Fisher Scientific) coupled to an Q-Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
